donate.title: Donate to {{mosqueName}}
donate.cover_fees_desc: Add {{fee}} so 100% goes to the mosque
donate.periodic_info: With a periodic gift (minimum 5 years), you can fully deduct your donation from taxes, without threshold. After filling in the form, you will receive a PDF agreement to sign.
donate.periodic_min_years: Minimum 5 years required for tax deduction.
donate.periodic_fields_required: Please fill in all required fields (name, email, address, amount)
donate.periodic_success_desc: Your agreement has been downloaded as PDF. Print it, sign both copies and send one copy to the mosque.
confirm.title: Jazak Allahu Khairan
confirm.subtitle: Your donation has been received
confirm.message: May Allah accept your contribution and reward you abundantly.
